arts.ttl: Former Manchester United player ruled out of Old Trafford return with Everton
arts.sum: Everton will make the trip to Old Trafford on Sunday but will be without a former Man United midfielder.

arts.ttl: Man United injury latest as three players set to miss Everton after Lisandro Martinez boost
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news as Ruben Amorim has a decent sized squad for the upcoming Premier League triple header

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Manchester United have made ‘advances’ for player – Forced club to step up their own pursuit
arts.sum: ‘Advances’ from Liverpool and Manchester United for Lanús youngster Julio Soler have prompted River Plate to make their move for the full-back. That’s according to journalist Jonathan Riniti on El Crack Deportivo, relayed by Soy del Millo, who says both of the Premier League side have made moved for the 19-year-old. arts.ttl: Francis Ngannou 'flattens' Man Utd keeper Andre Onana in wrestling match on Old Trafford pitch
arts.sum: Video emerges of the Cameronian friends tussling on the fabled Manchester United turf

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher makes major Man United prediction U-turn after Ruben Amorim start
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim won his first game as Manchester United manager on Thursday night

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim 'appoints position specific coaches in major change from Erik ten Hag era' - as Man United head coach shakes up training
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has reportedly appointed separate coaches to work with different parts of Manchester United's squad as he sees to overhaul the club's fortunes.

arts.ttl: Everton announce first season ticket prices at new stadium with Friedkin Group confirmation
arts.sum: The first season ticket prices for the new Everton Stadium have been announced with the cost ranging from £199 to £900

arts.ttl: Forgotten Everton summer signing set to finally make squad for Man Utd clash
arts.sum: Everton pushed ahead with a deal to sign Armando Broja on loan from Chelsea on deadline day but the forward has yet to play for the Blues because of an Achilles injury

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim agrees with Erik ten Hag on Man Utd star who is the 'kind of player we need'
arts.sum: Manchester United right-back Noussair Mazraoui was solid defensively as well as dangerous going forward against Bodo/Glimt and he was praised by Ruben Amorim after the game
